description: Letter in Ladino from Reʾuven Miris or Mires and addressed to Avraham Krispin (Crespin) who on the address section is listed as being in "Mitzraim" (Cairo). In the heading this letter is dated 1787 CE (Iyyar [5]547). A wide array of numerical figures are expressed in silver medin coinage, which appears here though the abbreviation " מאיי ". The author also mentions having received a letter from Shmuel Hanan ("חנן" l. 14r) via Izmir. The Mediterranean sea itself is also mentioned in the phrase "אי סוברי לה מאר" (l. 12r). The verso appears to have been reused for numerical calculations. MCD.
description_he: מכתב בלאדינו מאת ראובן מיריס אל אברהם קריספין בקהיר; מתוארך לאייר תקמ'ז = 1787 לספירה; מזכיר קבלת מכתב מאת שמואל חנן דרך אזמיר
